categories.title: Working Instance Lifecycle
categories.summary: Make generated Mole instances easier to validate, compare with source, and upgrade conservatively.
categories.priority_notes: This aligns with the current product goal of making working instances credible beyond initial scaffolding.

categories.title: Command Surface
categories.summary: Make outcome-oriented Mole commands more consistent and useful without overbuilding the backend.
categories.priority_notes: This supports adoption, but follows the instance lifecycle work.

categories.title: Team Collaboration
categories.summary: Make Mole safer and clearer for teams using shared cloud-synced folders as a local file system.
categories.priority_notes: This is the next active category because previous PRD categories are complete and team shared-folder use is a likely adoption path.

categories.title: Molehill Metrics
categories.summary: Add lightweight local metrics for processed inbox items so Mole workspaces can show daily, weekly, and monthly processing activity without hosted analytics.
categories.priority_notes: This builds on the completed inbox processing lock and receipt workflow, keeps the local-first architecture, and improves confidence that teams are feeding the mole consistently.
